arts.ttl: Milan Facing Stern Competition from German Powerhouse for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund are reportedly taking concrete steps to beat Milan and Barcelona to Marcus Rashford's signature. According to the Daily Mail, the Germans have identified the out-of-favor Manchester United forward as a perfect replacement for Donyell Malen.
